consistency.rarity_check: The 'rarity' field ('Rare') matches the information in 'source_type_rarity' ('Weapon (longsword), rare').
consistency.type_check: The 'type' field ('Weapon (longsword)') is consistent with the item description and 'source_type_rarity'.

quality.completeness: The JSON object is complete, containing slug, name, type, rarity, attunement requirement, and a detailed description.
quality.readability: The description is well-formatted and clearly explains the item's mechanics (bonus action activation, finesse property, +2 bonus, radiant damage type, extra damage vs. undead, and light emission/manipulation).

properties: Light emission (Bright/Dim, adjustable radius up to 30ft, dim light extends 15ft beyond bright light)
